reviews.review_title: Was not able to refund a very bad game
reviews.review_description:
Looked fun on TikTok and YouTube, but when I downloaded it, it was an as fun as I thought, and my refund got declined 
￼

developer_response.body:
Hey, really sorry to hear that, it’s definitely frustrating when something doesn’t meet expectations. Refunds are handled directly by Meta, so unfortunately I don’t have control over that process.

If you’re open to it, I’d love to hear what didn’t click for you. I’m always working on improving the experience and your feedback would really help.

We just launched a brand new update that should have fixed a ton of bugs as well as added undo/redo

reviews.review_description:
This game exceeds my expectations of being more than a simple rollercoaster builder, I bought this game thinking I would play through the campaign and quite frankly get bored and quit the game; except I never did. Coaster Mania has one of, if not the best coaster building simulators in Vr, and for the 15 dollar price tag I would say it’s worth every penny. Roller coaster enthusiasts will love this game. But the best part about this game is the AR mode, it allows you to simulate the rollercoasters as if they were right in the room with you; plus the sandbox mode allows for you to have any rollercoaster model you can think of and make to be right there. Also forgot to mention how perfect the gravity and friction systems for the coasters are in this game. 
Although there are some requests I’d like to make:
1. Allow for there to be multiple train cars except instead your able to choose if you want them to run separately rather than as one train.
2. Have more campaign levels with more props and machines.
(Plus a bug):
The bug makes it where even if I’ve collected all the special props from the unlockable sections, it will say I didn’t when I open sandbox mode in a new project.
But anyways, other than all that, this game is something I would highly recommend if you have any imagination and like rollercoasters.

This is a really good rollercoaster builder and has a lot of potential, there's a couple of problems I thought of, one problem is with the paraglider if it flies too far even landing on a rail it misses the rail in first person, a suggestion I could make, it would be great to have more prop options like soldiers or things moving around like birds or planes or tanks but overall it's really fun and you can literally make a forever rollercoaster all over your house lol hope to see a good update

reviews.review_description: The reason why i got stuck on level 8 on world 3 is because when my coaster went through the portal it didn't work even though it was going in the right direction but other than that problem the rest of the game is good but still a little buggy

I bought this game because I was looking for a good roller coaster builder to use to sketch out ideas before making them in no limits 2. This one seemed good but I didn't expect much.
I was so pleasantly surprised with how much there is to this game especially with campaign mode. it's not the most accurate and some turns can be a a bit odd but it's pretty close and it's super fun and easy to use.
I could play for hours I love this !

reviews.review_description: My coaster fast it go nyoooooom

The main reason I bought this game was because I wanted to build roller coasters around my house in passthrough, and it definitely lived up to that hype…the first time.

MAIN PROBLEM:
When you save a rollercoaster and then open it later to continue working on it, the app has trouble remembering the position and scale of the rollercoaster. I don't know much about how vr games are developed, so I don't know how easy or hard it is to make it remember where it is, but this feature would be much needed.

But if not, there's sort of a solution to this in the game already. By holding the 2 grab buttons, you can move, rotate, and scale your roller coaster. The problem is that they make you do these three things all at once. The controls feel EXTREMELY JANKY trying to line up the rollercoaster while also trying to remember where it even was to begin with! This makes the passthrough gimmick feel half-baked, and makes the game feel like any mediocre rollercoaster builder, rather than a cool and immersive one.

BUGS:
Also the game is just super buggy. It seems like I find new bugs every time I play, because I have edited this review many times to report new ones.

In the campaign mode, sometimes when you delete all the track, the bar doesn't fill all the way up again. 

Sometimes when I'm trying to build a STRAIGHT track, it will randomly make a tiny corkscrew that flips the entire thing.

Sometimes when I let go of a track, the game will think I'm still editing it, and prevents me from editing/adding to other tracks. Or interacting with any menus, essentially softlocking the game.

There should really be a limit to how much track you can place if you want to upload it to the online mode. There was this one level I downloaded that had so much track I had about 1fps and the game became unplayable.

Some levels in campaign mode have hidden collectables that are supposed to unlock something when collected, but I guess some levels don't know what they're supposed to unlock, so it just doesn't give you anything and says something like "You have unlocked {null} in the editor!" On the victory screen.

If you make a singular line of track with no connected tracks, you can connect that track to itself via making another track, which looks super weird and definitely not intended.

If a car is moving down the tracks and you pause and unpause it, sometimes it won't act the same way compared to if you didn't pause it (it could miss jumps it already made for example).

Tracks sometimes draw supports that can use a track below it as the ground and/or not be long enough to reach the ground (no matter how accurately your space is set up)

In conclusion, I LOVE the concept of this game, but the execution isnt the best.

developer_response.body:
Wow! Thanks for the detailed feedback. We will take all of this to heart and work on fixing those bugs. 

Appreciate the support!

Nothingness￼

developer_response.body: Thanks for the suggestion! CoasterMania is about creating rollercoasters, not as much theme parks. Maybe some day though! Stay tuned :)

reviews.review_description:
Overall, the game is fun and engaging, but I purchased it believing I could ride the roller coasters I created in mixed reality - traveling across my room while enjoying the ride. However, the mixed reality feature only functions during the building phase of the coasters within your space.​

Additionally, I encountered an error message stating, "We cannot scan your room setup," which I hope is just a mistake on my end.​

I genuinely hope that future updates will allow us to ride the coasters in mixed reality. Just imagine how awesome it would be to experience your room from a miniature perspective while riding the coaster across your own space.​

It would also be great to have roller coasters with multiple carts connected to one another, rather than just a single one.​

I'm still undecided about whether to request a refund. The game is enjoyable, but it's missing the mixed reality feature I was expecting.

UPDATE: I kept the game because it is fun. I'm excited for future updates.

Now I absolutely love this game, but it’s getting 1 star. It’s getting 1 star because when I creat my roller coaster and save it, and come back to it the roller coaster is always somewhere else in my house. It gets annoying to always fix where everything goes.

developer_response.body:
Hi there! 

Wanted to let you know this has since been fixed in the latest update. Hope you check it out!

reviews.review_description: The littles and I have a blast with this one. Super super easy to make complex creations, my 5 year old figured it out in minutes, tons of squeals of delight from us all

I really like the concept of this app. Building and riding roller coasters in your own room is such a fun and unique experience. For me, the standout feature is being able to actually ride the coasters you build. There’s also a campaign mode and the option to explore rides made by the community, which adds a lot of replay value. In sandbox mode, you get access to a variety of tools to design your environment and create unique coaster experiences. That said, I do feel the current price might be a bit high for the amount of features available right now. I truly hope the developers continue to bring fresh ideas and creative updates to the app. One feature I’d love to see in the future is the ability to fully scan your real room with textures, so you could ride coasters through your actual environment instead of just abstract shapes. That would take immersion to the next level. Of course, this request is more directed at the Meta team, since that kind of functionality relies heavily on the low-level capabilities of the Quest 3 hardware. Overall, this is a very promising app with a unique vision, and I’m excited to see where it goes!
Nice game cool game

Great app. One of the best in VR history. Exceptional.

The drops need to have the shtick of real vertigo. The Himalaya level on Coaster Combat VR does this to perfection. I made a mega kamikaze roller coaster which as you can imagine had a doozy of a drop. Riding it, there was the thrill of going over the top of the hill but the descent was underwhelming. Is it that one has to get the track exactly right to get the true vertigo effect? What if even then the vertigo effect, the stomach dropping feeling seen in The Galactic Race on Theatre Elsewhere still wasn't there?
VR is in its early days. This app is to be much applauded.

It has a bug that causes the unlockables you earn not to be saved in sandbox mode, forcing you to repeat the level. Also, sometimes you open sandbox mode and the unlockables are there, but when you exit and go back in, they’re gone. This makes getting decorations for roller coasters really tedious.

One of the best mixed reality apps (in my opinion) on Meta Quest. Making your own rollercoasters in sandbox mode is cool and there's also a lot of puzzles to do. Easy to play and fun and you can incorporate your own room into it. Worth the price. 👍
i love this game so much, endless hours of fun!

I only downloaded this game today but have successfully completed 5 campaigns and rode those coasters , I had a lot of fun and can see already that this will be a much used and enjoyed asset to my vr experiences. I would definitely recommend this and the price is very good thankyou devs . I will be trying the sandbox mode tomorrow.

I've had this game for a week now and cannot stop playing it! I like the fact you can build the coasters, watch it run and then ride it yourself! 

For reference, Im a 68 yr old female but my granddaughter loves it as well, shes 9 yrs old! 

I wasnt sure i would enjoy this game upon getting it. I watched a video on youtube and decided to give it a whirl.

The game has a different modes, build your own, puzzle(where you connect  the track from one point to another) and the cool coasters that others have made that you can ride.  

If you like roller coasters and/or building things, this game is a definite must get! Great job DEVS and thank you!

reviews.review_title: Great game! Seems to be under advertised
reviews.review_description:
I got this game the other day and I love it! I can't wait to see what future updates might bring. I did notice that the game doesn't show up in the store unless you type the name bang on tho. Even typing "coaster" or "rollercoaster" into the search bar doesn't bring it up. 

Here's some ideas for future updates I'd personally love to see. 

1.more of a theme park element where you can add flat rides food stalls etc etc similar to rollercoaster Tycoon. 

2. Better environment when riding in POV, I personally don't feel like there's much depth perception when riding a tall ride and the head movement doesn't feel right when trying to peep over the side of the coaster.  The sky box might need to be improved or possibly add the option to add a custom sky box. 

3. It'd be nice to be able to build loops, banks etc easily without having to choose pre made ones. It's also quite difficult to get a piece of track level so maybe add a different colour when your track is level instead of trying to guess. 

4. Giant screens and ride queue customising. The ability to improve ride queues and add TV's would be cool. You could add a intro video like oblivion at Alton towers UK. 

5. Better avatars when riding the coasters. At the moment it's just a dummy so it'd be nice to be able to change that. 

6. Ride with friend's A multiplayer experience where you could ride simultaneously with friends would be a great feature. 

7. Coaster stats such as top speed, G force, number of Inversions and thrill level. 

Thanks for making this game I think it has a ton of potential and I don't think anyone should hesitate to buy it considering it's rather cheap price tag ✌️

The game is great. I have had an amazing time building roller coasters but I have one problem. Every time I move away from the roller coaster even a foot the whole thing moves far away from me then I have to put it back. It may just be for me but it’s a great game just look out for this.

I just spent 2 hours playing this for the first time
Simply amazing, the time just flew by, I was having so much fun.
The campaign is so engaging, designing your tracks to go through the checkpoints, being able to move around the room and check every detail is so satisfying.

At the price it’s just too good not to buy it.
The fact that you can then ride your creation is an added bonus.

I highly recommend CoasterMania for all ages
Simply outstanding.
Good honest game.  Did all campain.  fun puzzler. Less expensive and polish that TRACK CRAFT but still a fun relax game to play seated.

reviews.review_title: Seems Good, but with Big Flaws
reviews.review_description:
Controls for moving the set with the grab feature is a bit yoo slow and off, feelinglike it takes a bit more effort to move it as needed compared to other VR ganes that do the exact sane mexhanic.
Its also annoying to be accidently grabbing set track peices while trying to move.
The pointer also disappears every time I start a track, msking seldcting anything in any menus a huge hassle and guessing game.
Also yhe Ridr feature would be gun, bit (at least in Campaign mode), doing so ONLY lets you ride. And then ride again...
NO other options of you do this, as there is no other menus nor can you bring up the original menu. Meaning you have to quite the game and reload to get back to actually playing....


Outside of those huge issues that will seemingly never be fixed,  it otherwise seems like a nice game and very lax. This keeps me torn between regretting my purchase of this game and (even if only very brief moments) actually enjoying it.

My dad downloaded this game on my headset today while I was at school, and after I finished my homework  he told me to look at my game library, so I hopped on and I gotta say, I'm HOOKED! Its literally one of the funniest games I've ever played on my headset so I recommend you to try it. After playing, I had realized I spent 1 hour playing. I give it five stars, if you have family with a meta quest 3 then I recommend you buy them or tell them about this game. -KruzerVr
Good game !😀

Very fun and relaxing puzzle game!

Are you bored of another shooter hitting the store this week?

Fancy a change of pace?

Still need that adrenaline rush though?

Look no further than 'Rollercoastermania!'

There are plenty of challenges across 4 campaign modes that introduce new gadgets and devices to spice up the ride as well as a sandbox mode to get really creative!

My favourite part? When you complete the track you get to ride it! Such a fun and clever idea and very appealing to puzzle enthusiasts and rollercoaster fans alike!

The game is very well designed and clearly has had a lot of love, passion and creativity put into the controls, visuals and various ways to complete the tracks! My favourite is the Cannon! Sssh!

No more spoilers!

Pick up this very affordable game today, you won't regret it ❤️

reviews.review_title: Very fun, even better in Mixed Reality!
reviews.review_description: There is tons of fun to be had. If you have a creative mind, you can build some crazy coasters. Go for it!

reviews.review_title: More fun than a theme park.
reviews.review_description:
Coaster Mania is a fun, rewarding and addictive puzzle game with the enjoyment of being able to create and ride your own coasters, even in MR.

The general aim is to build your coaster from the station to the finish, but what starts off as a few simple levels soon becomes a brain twisting challenge. 

Best of all you can get creative with sandbox mode, add scenery and props and then ride on board to experience every drop, loop and corkscrew. 

Early days, but the devs have been incredibly responsive to feedback so what's already a highly recommended game looks set to keep getting better and better.
I love it like I stayed up till 12:34 pm it was so fun (I didn't know I stay up that late
The game is so much fun to play

So far I'm liking it. I've done 2 campaign tracks and I've done 1 freestyle track in home and both styles are fun. You can lose track of time quickly playing around. I wish there was a button to smooth out certain transitions just so when you ride you can get the best experience. Other than that I love it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the kind review & feedback!

reviews.review_description:
Wow, what an improvement! I have been playing this since it's early days when the toilet video went viral. And what a change since those days! 
The graphics are lovely, the AR aspect is now really well utilized and the levels now have proper puzzle elements as well.
Bravo, well done Devs.

reviews.review_description: Game is great. Fun building a roller coaster throughout my room as well fun making it crash. My kids love it too.
It needs a bit more content, but it's fun already

Coaster Mania is about an amazing way to take advantage of the passthrough of the Quest 2. This game is even made that much better if you are playing currently on a Quest Pro and in the future of a Quest 3 to utilize the color passthrough. You are able to create your own roller coaster with drops, turns, twists, and barrel rolls all in a virtual or mixed reality environment. The game is very easy to build your coasters with and very kid friendly too, making this game fun for all ages. You can decorate your own environment with various objects such as trees to add to the scenery of your awesome ride! Once you have built your perfect roller coaster you can take it for a ride and experience what it would be like to really be on it! I really think this might be the future of riding roller coasters! You can also share and upload your finished coaster so other people can ride it via the community board, which is a great feature for hundreds of different coaster so the fun never ends! The thing that i would like to see is if you could add a friend to the coaster top ride with you. I also would like to be able to ride my coaster in my mixed reality environment. I might have missed it but it seemed that i could only ride it in the virtual world. Other than that its a great game for a good price!
I am a tester of this game; And it is very fun to play with and mess around with. I highly recommend it
Game is great, and the dev responds quickly to bugs sugestions etc

Wonderful idea. Really fun to invent tracks in your own apartment and on your furniture!
I have a performance problem when in first person mode but probably an update in the future will solve this

developer_response.body:
Hi Gazzul!

I just pushed out a new update (v.19a) and hopefully that should resolve your issue. You can also join our discord: https://discord.gg/qaBgpCE39Y if you have any other problems. The game is in early access and always updating to get better and better 

Thanks, 
Steve
